title: The replication crisis and its relevance to Earth Science studies: Case studies and recommendations

L2: Poor data quality and omissions significantly affect research replicability across Earth sciences
Recommendations for improving reproducibility include transparent data sharing and methodological documentation
L3: Analysis of the replication crisis and its relevance to Earth Science research, presenting case studies demonstrating how data quality issues and methodological challenges affect replicability, with concrete recommendations for improving research reproducibility
